channel.title: Murmur
channel.description: Updates for Murmur, private on-device speech-to-text for macOS.

item.title: Version 0.7.5
item.description:
A visual refresh of the main window, plus a couple of robustness fixes.

  • A cleaner look: a compact icon sidebar that expands to labels, content in floating panels, and a seamless top bar with no divider seams.
  • Half-screen friendly: the sidebar collapses to icons so the transcript keeps its room, and the window now tiles to exactly half the screen.
  • Recording details no longer wrap into unreadable stacks on a narrow window.
  • Dictation no longer overwrites something you copied while it pastes.
  • Consistent brand-coloured selection and backgrounds throughout.
